# ProgressRateLimiter.Complete method

Clears the rate-limit state for *token* when the operation is terminal. Safe for an unknown token. Mirrors TS `complete`.

```csharp
public void Complete(ProgressToken token)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| token | The progress token. |
